articles.title: A Supermarket Smoke Break That Changes Everything
articles.summary: An overworked salaryman meets his crush behind a supermarket — but she's not who he expected. This summer's most surprising rom-com is coming to Crunchyroll in July!

articles.title: Final Fantasy XIV Says No to Butt Sliders — For Now
articles.summary: Square Enix won't let you change your character's butt size in Final Fantasy XIV... yet. But a funny moment at Fan Festival has fans hoping it might happen someday!

articles.title: Katie Boulter Teams Up with Tennis Legend Venus Williams
articles.summary: British tennis star Katie Boulter played doubles with her idol Venus Williams at the Madrid Open — and they won! Williams called Boulter's energy even better than her sister Serena's.
